name: Bob Mover
abstract: Bob Mover (born 1952) is an alto, tenor and soprano jazz saxophonist and a vocalist. He has been described as "the highly respected and extraordinary alto saxophonist, teacher, and theoretician".

about_quotes.speaker: Duffy Jackson
about_quotes.evidence: There was a gentleman by the name of Bob Mover, an alto saxophone player, we were in seventh and eighth grades together. And we shared a lot of great jazz experience around that time
about_quotes.doc_title: Duffy Jackson interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, October 17, 1995
